title: mentha × acutifolia var. nummularia
intro: Mentha × acutifolia var. nummularia, also known as pennyroyal, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. It is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its content of pulegone, a compound with analgesic and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of pennyroyal include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural insect repellent. Pennyroyal is often used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and tinctures, but it is essential to use it in moderation due to its potential toxicity.
